name: MAX6956 I/O Expander
description: The MAX6956 component allows you to use MAX6956 I/O expanders ([datasheet](https://datasheets.maximintegrated.com/en/ds/MAX6956.pdf)) in ESPHome. It uses [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) for communication.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the driver. Defaults to `0x40`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this `max6956` component.

config_entries.label: I2C ID
config_entries.description: The I²C Bus ID Defaults to `false`

config_entries.label: Brightness Global
config_entries.description: Set the value of the current to be sink by all pins configured as led driver. Defaults to `0`

config_entries.label: Brightness Mode
config_entries.description: Define if the current to be sink will be confgured globaly or per pin configured as led driver. Defaults to `global`
